property.name: headerLabel
property.label: Override Header Label
property.description: Optional: set a fixed label instead of the navigation label.

property.name: linkSetMasterLabel
property.label: Navigation Menu (Master Label)
property.description: Master Label of the navigation menu to use for the dynamic title.

property.name: parentPageApiName
property.label: Breadcrumb Parent API Name
property.description: API Name of the page for internal navigation (e.g. Home, Hostel_Details__c)

property.name: parentPageUrl
property.label: Breadcrumb Parent URL
property.description: Optional link for the parent breadcrumb item.

property.name: childPageName
property.label: Breadcrumb Child Label
property.description: Defaults to the header label if left blank.

property.name: childPageUrl
property.label: Breadcrumb Child URL
property.description: Optional link for the child breadcrumb item.
